data.name: Shards of the Past
data.detailed_description:
A routine trading trip to a nearby town takes an unexpected turn, pulling you into a mystery that spans the continent. In Shards of the Past, you navigate a branching narrative where your decisions challenge your understanding of your past and the history of the world around you. Every choice you make helps define the future, whether it leads to peaceful exploration or widespread conflict.

Immersive Storytelling

Shards of the Past is a mature, choice-driven visual novel built on the foundation of rich narrative and cinematic atmosphere.

  • Mature Themes: Explore complex, adult-oriented storytelling where decisions aren't always black and white.

  • High-Fidelity Visuals: Every scene is brought to life through custom-rendered 3D characters and detailed environments.

  • Thematic Soundscapes: An evocative musical score and immersive sound effects pull you deeper into the heart of the mystery.

Gameplay & Replayability

Your journey unfolds through interactive dialogue and high-stakes decision-making. Unlike traditional static visual novels, your path is truly your own:

  • Branching Consequences: Every choice ripples outward. Decisions can open new narrative paths or permanently lock others, ensuring your story is unique.

  • Dynamic Encounter System: To ensure no two journeys are identical, the game utilizes a random encounter generator. Even if you make the same choices in a second playthrough, the world may react in unexpected ways.

  • Multiple Finales: From total ruin to glorious triumph, the ending you receive is the direct result of the life you chose to lead.

Characters & Relationships

While on your journey, you are never truly alone. The people you meet are more than just faces in the crowd; they are your greatest allies or your most dangerous obstacles.

  • Forge Your Bonds: Through your interactions, you can spark intense rivalries or build enduring friendships that change the course of your journey.

  • Romantic Connections: Deepen your ties with specific characters, allowing some relationships to evolve into intimate and meaningful romantic paths based on your choices.

  • Shifting Loyalties: Be careful who you trust. Some individuals may hide their true intentions until the very end, and your treatment of them will determine where their loyalties lie when the dust settles.

data.short_description: A trading trip with a nearby village turns into an epic adventure when you discover a hidden truth about your world. You will meet new friends and foes, explore amazing places, and face a choice that will shape the future. Your actions and choices will determine the outcome of this story.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 法文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 簡體中文, 俄文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or Newer
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or higher (64bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible GPU/Integrated Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or higher (64bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or higher (64bit only)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
